breaking_alert: 💀 DAY 4 — 6 US KIA — 3 F-15s DOWN IN KUWAIT (FRIENDLY FIRE?) — QATAR SHOOTS DOWN 2 IRANIAN JETS — IRAN THREATENS TO TORCH TANKERS — 555+ IRANIAN DEAD — STRIKES CONTINUE

naval_deployments.name: CSG-3 — USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72)
naval_deployments.ships: CVN-72 Abraham Lincoln, CG-52 Bunker Hill, DDG-92 Momsen, DDG-114 Ralph Johnson
naval_deployments.notes: 7th Fleet AOR — presence ops near South China Sea

naval_deployments.name: CSG-5 — USS Ronald Reagan (CVN-76)
naval_deployments.ships: CVN-76 Ronald Reagan, CG-54 Antietam, DDG-85 McCampbell
naval_deployments.notes: Homeport maintenance — Lincoln assumed 7th Fleet carrier duties

naval_deployments.name: CSG-12 — USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78)
naval_deployments.ships: CVN-78 Gerald R. Ford, CG-66 Hue City, DDG-104 Sterett, DDG-110 William P. Lawrence
naval_deployments.notes: Eastern Med deterrence — backdrop to US-Iran Geneva talks (Feb 26)

naval_deployments.name: CSG-9 — USS Nimitz (CVN-68)
naval_deployments.ships: CVN-68 Nimitz, CG-57 Lake Champlain, DDG-76 Higgins, DDG-71 Ross
naval_deployments.notes: Active strike ops vs Iran. Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72) NOT hit despite Iranian claims. F-35C + F/A-18 + Tomahawks. HIMARS ATACMS fired.

naval_deployments.name: ARG — USS Bataan (LHD-5)
naval_deployments.ships: LHD-5 Bataan, LPD-23 Anchorage, LSD-50 Carter Hall + 26th MEU
naval_deployments.notes: Operating with NATO partners in Mediterranean

naval_deployments.name: 🇷🇺 Northern Fleet — Severomorsk
naval_deployments.ships: Adm. Kuznetsov (CV — refit), Pyotr Velikiy (CGN), multiple SSNs/SSBNs
naval_deployments.notes: Reduced surface ops. Submarine activity elevated. NATO P-8 patrols active.

naval_deployments.name: 🇷🇺 Black Sea Fleet — Novorossiysk
naval_deployments.ships: Significantly degraded — losses to Ukrainian drone/missile strikes. Remaining frigates, landing ships.
naval_deployments.notes: Fleet relocated from Sevastopol after repeated Ukrainian strikes. Severely diminished capability.

naval_deployments.name: 🇨🇳 PLA Navy — South Sea Fleet
naval_deployments.ships: Type 003 Fujian (CV) — drills near Taiwan Strait, Type 055 destroyers, Type 093 SSNs
naval_deployments.notes: Fujian conducting training exercises near Taiwan Strait. Elevated regional posture.

naval_deployments.name: 🇮🇷 IRIN — Persian Gulf (COMBAT)
naval_deployments.ships: Frigates, IRGCN fast attack craft, Ghadir-class midget submarines
naval_deployments.notes: ⚡ DAY 3: Iranian frigate sunk by US. Ships attacked near Hormuz. IRGCN fast attack craft in combat. Iran retaliating with missiles/drones on Gulf states. Hormuz closure enforced.

chokepoints.name: Strait of Hormuz
chokepoints.note: Iran threatens to TORCH TANKERS. Ships attacked. IRGC ban in effect. Oil spiking.

chokepoints.name: Bab el-Mandeb
chokepoints.note: Houthi drone/missile attacks ongoing. US Navy coalition patrols active. Commercial vessels avoiding.

chokepoints.name: Taiwan Strait
chokepoints.note: PLA Fujian carrier drills. US FON transits ongoing. Monitor for JOINT SWORD trigger.

chokepoints.name: Suez Canal
chokepoints.note: Operating normally. Reduced throughput as vessels reroute from Red Sea via Cape of Good Hope.

chokepoints.name: GIUK Gap
chokepoints.note: Russian submarine transit monitoring. NATO P-8 Poseidon patrols active.

chokepoints.name: Malacca Strait
chokepoints.note: Normal commercial traffic. Routine piracy monitoring.

conflicts.name: Ukraine-Russia War
conflicts.update: Zelenskyy-Trump call Feb 25 re: peace talks. US-Ukraine envoys meeting Geneva Feb 26. Russia recruiting 1,700+ African mercenaries. Frontlines static in Donbas.

conflicts.name: Gaza Conflict
conflicts.update: Overshadowed by Iran conflict. IDF operations continuing. Ceasefire/hostage talks paused amid broader regional war.

conflicts.name: Red Sea / Houthi Campaign
conflicts.update: Houthi drone/missile attacks on shipping ongoing. Nimitz CSG in North Arabian Sea. Commercial vessels rerouting via Cape of Good Hope.

conflicts.name: Israel-Lebanon Border
conflicts.update: Ceasefire largely holding since Nov 2024. IDF buffer zone in southern Lebanon maintained. Sporadic incidents only.

conflicts.name: Syria — Post-Assad Transition
conflicts.update: HTS-led government consolidating control post-Assad fall. ISIS remnants active in east Syria. Turkey, US, Israel all maintaining presence.

conflicts.name: Taiwan Strait Tensions
conflicts.update: PLA Fujian carrier conducting drills near strait. Philippines People Power 40th anniversary protests. US FON transits maintained.

conflicts.name: South China Sea Disputes
conflicts.update: PLA activity elevated near Spratlys. Philippines-China standoffs at Second Thomas Shoal continuing. Marcos Jr under pressure domestically.

conflicts.name: 💀 OP EPIC FURY — DAY 4
conflicts.update: DAY 4: 6 US KIA confirmed. 3 F-15s crashed in Kuwait (friendly fire?). Qatar downed 2 Iranian jets + intercepted 7 BMs + 5 drones. Iran threatens to torch tankers at Hormuz. 555 dead in Iran, 10+ Israel, 6 US, 5 Gulf states. Spain refuses base access. Lebanon bans Hezbollah military. Trump: attacks continue until all objectives met.

exercises.name: COBRA GOLD 2026
exercises.participants: US, Thailand, Japan, Singapore, Indonesia, Malaysia, South Korea
exercises.notes: Largest multilateral exercise in Indo-Pacific. Currently active.

exercises.name: DEFENDER EUROPE 2026
exercises.notes: Annual large-scale NATO ground exercise. Planning underway.

exercises.name: STEADFAST DEFENDER 2026
exercises.notes: NATO's largest defensive exercise. Focus on eastern flank.

exercises.name: VOSTOK 2026 (Russia)
exercises.notes: Annual Russian strategic exercise. China participation expected.

exercises.name: JOINT SWORD (China)
exercises.notes: Unannounced China exercises triggered by Taiwan events. Monitor for JOINT SWORD triggers.

exercises.name: RED FLAG 26-2
exercises.notes: RED FLAG 26-1 completed Jan 2026. 26-2 planned for spring.

gps_zones.name: Eastern Ukraine / Donbas
gps_zones.notes: Active Russian GPS jamming and spoofing. Ongoing since 2022.

gps_zones.name: Northern Finland / Lapland
gps_zones.notes: Russian jamming from Kola Peninsula. Affecting Finnish/Norwegian airspace.

gps_zones.name: Baltic States
gps_zones.notes: Intermittent Russian jamming. NATO monitoring closely.

gps_zones.name: Black Sea / Romania
gps_zones.notes: Spoofing incidents ongoing. Vessels reporting false positions.

gps_zones.name: Israel / Eastern Med
gps_zones.notes: Active IDF jamming over Israel and Lebanon. Ongoing since Oct 2023.

gps_zones.name: Syria / Iraq Border
gps_zones.notes: Multi-source jamming — US, Russian, Turkish forces all operating systems.

gps_zones.name: Red Sea / Yemen
gps_zones.notes: Houthi spoofing affecting commercial shipping navigation.

gps_zones.name: Taiwan Strait
gps_zones.notes: PLA jamming exercises. Intermittent disruption to civil aviation.

gps_zones.name: South China Sea — Spratlys
gps_zones.notes: Chinese jamming around artificial islands. Philippine vessels reporting.

gps_zones.name: Kaliningrad
gps_zones.notes: Russian exclave jamming. Affecting NE Poland and Lithuania airspace.

gps_zones.name: ⚡ Persian Gulf / Hormuz — WARTIME JAMMING
gps_zones.notes: ACTIVE. Iran in combat state. Full-spectrum jamming and spoofing expected across Persian Gulf, Strait of Hormuz, and Gulf of Oman. All navigation caution.

notams.name: 🔴 Israel Airspace CLOSED — MISSILES INBOUND
notams.notes: FULL CLOSURE. 10+ dead from Iranian missile/drone strikes. IDF intercepting. Haifa hit. Ben Gurion closed. Citizens in shelters. Hezbollah fired rockets from Lebanon — Lebanon subsequently banned Hezbollah military activities.

notams.name: Red Sea NOTAM
notams.notes: UKMTO/US Navy warnings. Commercial vessels avoiding core lanes.

notams.name: Lebanon Restrictions
notams.notes: Beirut airport operational. South Lebanon restricted.

notams.name: 🔴 Iran Airspace CLOSED — ACTIVE STRIKES
notams.notes: FULL CLOSURE. US-Israel joint strikes active as of 28 Feb 2026. Tehran, Isfahan, Qom, Karaj, Kermanshah targeted. Iran airspace closed by Tasnim News Agency. No civilian flights.

notams.name: Taiwan Strait Notice
notams.notes: PLA activity. Airlines rerouting. Monitor for JOINT SWORD trigger.

notams.name: Baltic Air Policing
notams.notes: NATO Enhanced Air Policing active. Russian intercepts ongoing.

notams.name: North Korea Exclusion Zone
notams.notes: DPRK airspace fully restricted. ICAO warnings active.

notams.name: 🔴 Bahrain — US 5th Fleet HQ STRUCK
notams.notes: NSA Bahrain (5th Fleet HQ) — struck by Iranian missiles. Continued attacks Day 2-3. Residential buildings damaged. Status of US personnel: 3 KIA total in theater (locations not specified).

notams.name: 🔴 Qatar — Downed 2 Iranian Jets, 7 BMs Intercepted
notams.notes: Qatar downed 2 Iranian fighter jets. Intercepted 7 BMs + 5 drones. Al Udeid AB targeted.

notams.name: 🔴 UAE — Missile Attack, 1 KIA
notams.notes: UAE confirmed Iranian missile attacks. 1 Pakistani civilian killed Abu Dhabi, 4 injured Palm Dubai. Airspace partially closed. Al Dhafra AB (F-22s, tankers) on high alert. Total Gulf state deaths: 5.

notams.name: Sudan Airspace NOTAM
notams.notes: RSF-SAF civil war ongoing. Khartoum area dangerous.

notams.name: Myanmar Conflict Zone
notams.notes: Civil war continuing. Military junta vs resistance forces. Airspace hazardous.

notams.name: 🔴 Jordan — 2 Iranian Missiles Intercepted
notams.notes: Jordan intercepted 2 Iranian ballistic missiles. Not a combatant — Iran broadening retaliation. Jordanian airspace restricted.

notams.name: 🔴 Kuwait — 3 US F-15s Down (Friendly Fire?)
notams.notes: 3 F-15s crashed in Kuwait. CENTCOM: mistakenly shot down. Kuwait investigating.

notams.name: Konarak Naval Base — Vessels Burning
notams.notes: CONFIRMED: Satellite imagery (Vantor) shows burning vessels at pier. Konarak Naval Base, southern Iran. IRGCN fast attack craft base.
